title: coelogyne parvula
intro: Coelogyne parvula, a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and Southeast Asia, is a type of flowering plant known for its small white flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne parvula include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas or infusions, and its extracts can also be found in supplement form.
